creator: moonlapse81@gmail.com
text:
after looking for similar issues, reported upstream, there is seems to be generic pattern in gpu issues like i observing, i will leave reference here, which has many other reports. for a sake of information. currently, i do not know whether it has been ever fully resolved, even in very latest linux kernel, if they are not triggered by something outside kernel, id est mesa.

https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/drm/intel/-/issues?label_name[]=GPU%20hang
